textByHashes.d440044c828f3fdd43c2b8b84e6175f427db4f9b: I was wondering where she got to. Where is she now?
textByHashes.c6e9741bd5ecf4bca44adfdbf64950da5ffa87fa: What a disaster! It's going to take forever to find a new willing assistant who's competent as well.
textByHashes.db0d1281c0076b9014214549889617789cc47638: Well I suppose I can give you some. Consider it a thank you for bringing me the news about my assistant.
textByHashes.b545b7887bf5357e531b8c24fb096489d23c8661: Come back when you have some room for it.
textByHashes.dc228a803aca36cfb1bfdfefe277e9ea88a5be21: No, it's fine. I'll send my new assistant to get me some... Once I find a new assistant anyway.
textByHashes.53740199c3bf2a9e322dbf1522ffa356e5a9a164: Looks like you already have some.
textByHashes.ab611074b76ba6f8e1f2ad5c3e7251eac16b99f8: Did I not already give you some?
textByHashes.648df0b50e09e137f0c0f237db054b6e1391612b: Oh... Well I suppose I can spare some.
textByHashes.db99c04a00de4ce812e0b8c3978a181427b0cd09: I am Daer Krand, an old student of Zandar Horfyre.
textByHashes.0c2ddb60075c77597a18d9f8ce6a20ff83f07464: It's a pleasure to make your acquaintance.
textByHashes.86b7dc54c99dbb056bf709aec30786f02963d71d: Great question! I have a better one...
textByHashes.9c03ab35ad7634a6025ec83e05e209a7885f897f: What is the Elixir of Everlasting?
textByHashes.5c66ecba6ed818261736b6cce445ffe59db56728: Exactly! This table here is full of notes on the topic. Plenty of warnings that seem to be scribbled over the top in a rather rushed manner...
textByHashes.45bb382ce04be0c460f0c84ca96175cc91bdb177: Sorry... I tend to ramble when excited.
textByHashes.b5e29a79d2135f0043f17771ab81f2e4728f7ae9: Me? Pah! I'm a dab hand at magic but my herblore has always been somewhat lacking. I'd go to the druids in Taverley but they don't trust us anymore... Know of any talented herbalists in the vicinity?
textByHashes.0ff4c9b3c261787041db5b884e6613a71abe9a42: Anywho, I've yet to completely make sense of all these notes. Some must have been placed elsewhere.
textByHashes.45145bd0235b4593f68638f9c68c5e0f7af99c3e: Maybe that loathsome vampyre wandering about knows something?
textByHashes.71ce307041e8a15dc4718c9bbee78dc7f93eefbe: Hmm, you might be right. He'll be of no use...
textByHashes.5369b077482c71f75d41c52c6e286af22e2c00ff: Yes? Oh, of course! Keep your eyes peeled when you're down here. If you see anything of interest, you know where to find me.
textByHashes.3ea5682ebe192ce08451c0e3462b5c13395076da: Here, solve this for me. I need to keep working on these notes.
textByHashes.10ba7455f73a9c7bee6e75fb4b7bd4a4f48aeca5: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.
